transcript:
CALLER: Hello? Uh, mujhe ek dermatologist se appointment chahiye. Skin allergy ka issue hai mujhe.
AGENT: Haan zaroor. Hamare paas Dr. Sneha Marathe hain dermatology department mein. Aapko kab convenient rahega?
CALLER: Agle hafte? Tuesday ya Wednesday?
AGENT: Tuesday ko 4 PM aur Wednesday ko 11 AM available hai Dr. Marathe ke saath. Kaun sa prefer karenge?
CALLER: Tuesday 4 PM. Naam hai mera Pranav Deshpande, number 9823456789.
AGENT: Done! Appointment confirmed — Pranav Deshpande, Dr. Sneha Marathe, next Tuesday 4 PM. SMS confirmation aayega.
CALLER: Great, thank you!
